reviews.review_description: A Way Home is an innovative and impactful VR experience that shines a spotlight on the Convention on the Rights of the Child (CRC) and its profound effects on children worldwide. As a user who is passionate about social justice and children's rights, I found this app to be an enlightening and transformative experience.

This VR experience provides a powerful and immersive contrast into the lives of children affected in jurisdictions that support their basic human rights versus those that do not. It also provides a glimpse into a treaty that lists these rights and reveals the one country that still has not ratified it close to thirty years later. As someone dedicated to education and advocacy, A Way Home offers an opportunity to raise awareness, foster empathy, and inspire action, making it invaluable for anyone committed to promoting children's rights.
